description: Confirm all required enum keys from version.json exist in registry.json.
Confirm exact enum value counts for all eight enums.
Validate all string enum values (excluding tier) match /^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$/.
Ensure each enum array has no duplicate values.
Ensure all tier values are integers, not strings.
Ensure no top-level enum key name collisions with narrative registry; create narrative stub if absent.
Ensure lane is 'pressure' in both registry.json and version.json.
Ensure registryId values match each other and PRESSURE_ENUM_REGISTRY_V1.
